overall.description: Gameplay footage from a cinematic third-person action game showing a character exploring a stormy medieval harbor. The character moves from a wooden dock building onto a rain-soaked pier, boards a tall ship, explores the deck during a heavy storm, enters a cabin, and climbs to the upper deck. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with torchlight contrasting against the blue-green stormy weather.

events.description: approaching the open doorway, natural light from outside becomes visible illuminating the exit
character exits the wooden cabin onto the exterior dock

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit wooden cabin toward the exit, passing rope coils and wooden crates

entered.detail: burning torch mounted on the wooden wall providing warm orange light
closed wooden storage chest against the wall
window opening showing stormy sky outside
coiled rope lying on the wooden floor
stacked wooden crates near the wall
open doorway leading to the exterior dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit wooden cabin interior illuminated by a wall torch. The space contains nautical supplies like rope coils and wooden crates. As the character approaches the doorway around 10 seconds, exterior light becomes visible, and they exit onto the dock at the segment end.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock pier with moored tall ship

events.description: exits the cabin into the foggy exterior dock area
turns slightly right toward the ship's gangplank

agents.ego_description: walking along the weathered wooden dock toward the moored ship, passing a large man standing guard

notable_agents.action: large man with axe standing near the doorway, watching the character pass by

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the dock pier extending toward the ship
rope railing along the edge of the dock
tall wooden ship hull with red accents moored at the dock
glowing red lantern hanging from the ship's rigging
misty mountains visible in the background across the water

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the cabin onto a foggy wooden dock. A large man with an axe stands near the doorway watching as the character passes. The character walks toward a tall wooden ship with glowing red lanterns, with misty mountains visible in the background. The atmosphere is damp and overcast.

scene_state.functional_zone: storm-tossed ship deck with heavy rain

events.description: heavy rain begins falling on the ship deck, reducing visibility
approaching the ship's cabin entrance while rain intensifies

agents.ego_description: walking across the rain-slicked ship deck toward the cabin entrance, passing crew members working in the storm

notable_agents.action: crew member standing near the ship railing in the heavy rain

entered.detail: wooden deck of the ship with wet planks reflecting the red lantern light
tall wooden mast with rigging and ropes extending upward
rope cargo net hanging from the ceiling beams
wooden barrel secured to the deck
doorway leading to the lower deck cabin
heavy rain falling across the scene with visible rain streaks

segments.scene_description: The character boards the ship and walks across the deck as heavy rain begins to fall around 25 seconds. The deck is illuminated by red lanterns and the stormy sky. Crew members stand near the railings, and the character heads toward a doorway leading below deck while rain intensifies.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship's lower deck cabin with supplies

events.description: enters the wooden cabin below deck, leaving the storm behind
large man briefly blocks the doorway as he enters the cabin behind the character

agents.ego_description: entering the cramped ship cabin and approaching a young boy sitting inside, while a large man follows in behind

notable_agents.action: young boy sitting on a bench inside the cabin, looking up
large man entering the cabin through the doorway behind the character

entered.detail: enclosed wooden cabin interior with low ceiling beams
heavy red fabric curtains partitioning the space
shelves holding various supplies and pottery
simple wooden bed with red bedding
rolled scrolls and maps on a shelf

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cramped below-deck cabin, leaving the storm outside. Inside, red curtains partition the space, wooden shelves hold supplies, and a young boy sits on a bench. A large man enters behind the character, briefly blocking the doorway. The space is dimly lit and sheltered from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper ship deck during heavy storm

events.description: exits the cabin back onto the rain-soaked ship deck
climbing wooden stairs to the upper deck level

agents.ego_description: exiting the cabin and climbing to the upper deck, looking out at the stormy coastline and ship rigging

entered.detail: elevated wooden deck with grated flooring sections
complex network of ropes and lines connecting the masts
rocky coastline visible through the rain and mist
heavy rain falling across the scene

segments.scene_description: The character exits the cabin back into the heavy storm, then climbs wooden stairs to the upper deck. From this elevated position, the character looks out at the ship's rigging, the rain-slicked deck below, and the distant rocky shoreline through the storm. The red lanterns glow through the rain as the character explores the upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered interior of a harbor building out into a violent storm aboard a tall ship. It begins inside a dimly lit wooden cabin filled with nautical supplies, moving toward a doorway where the warm torchlight gives way to the damp, gray light of a foggy dock. As the character passes a guard and approaches the vessel, the scene shifts from the misty shoreline to the rain-slicked deck of the ship, illuminated by glowing red lanterns under an intensifying downpour. The camera then follows the character back into the shelter of a cramped below-deck cabin partitioned by red curtains before emerging once more into the heavy rain. Finally, the movement ascends a set of wooden stairs to the upper deck, opening up to a wide view of the ship's rigging and a distant rocky shoreline through the storm.
